series_metadata.series_description: All records concerning private grants to OBR which document the expenditure and use of private dollars. Also, requests for proposals, proposals, evaluation materials, reports and other related materials. This schedule only covers private grant programs that do not have an individual record retention schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper records may be scanned and destroyed. from date of submission of final report or as otherwise agreed between OBR and party awarding grant, whichever is longer. In event of an open audit on these records at end of retention period, audit is complete and discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: from date of submission of final report or as otherwise agreed between OBR and party awarding grant, whichever is longer. In event of an open audit on these records at end of retention period, audit is complete and discrepancies resolved
